reviews.review_description: I should definitely be a mod

I had a fun time playing the game and moderators are nice and they will play with you and honestly this game is amazing. There are some things you guys could add like a sandbox mode or even like a lounge in the map but that’s up to you and this is just my opinion. Also, can you un moderate some moderators if you can.
